localizations.title: The Noside Show
localizations.hiddenObject_1: The circus' neon light flashes oddly in the app.
localizations.code_1: Despite all the efforts deployed by the diabolical Noside, the circus is saved! The children of Clarenquette-le-Beaugrisson can find new happiness, but it's only a matter of time. And next time, he'll hit hard (well, he'll hit)!
localizations.hint_6_first: Take a better look at the neon light in the app.
localizations.hint_6: During the flashing, some letters remain lit. They form a number. Take the corresponding card.
localizations.hint_12: There is a circus artist who is in the habit of climbing high. Find her trailer.
localizations.hint_13: You need a sharp tool for cutting this rope.
localizations.hint_14: The black stripes are missing. Drawing them should do the trick.
localizations.hint_15: You need your ticket to be stamped. The nice lady at the cashier will stamp yours.
localizations.hint_16: Find a waste and the generator will re-start.
localizations.hint_17_first: Elephants are scared of the mice. Everybody knows that! You'd better find one.
localizations.hint_17: If you have no genuine mice, maybe someone at the circus could make you one.
localizations.hint_18: What if you'd literally look for the next number?
localizations.hint_19: To move forward, you need a handsaw. Even if it seems strange, look in the aquarium.
localizations.hint_22: Several of these fish will come in handy during the adventure. The hammer-shark is too big, it won't move from here.
localizations.hint_24_first: All that's left to do is to put it back in the right cage. Tiger Ray will assist you.
localizations.hint_24: Ray's stripes show in what order you need to put back the animals.
localizations.hint_27_first: If you can't find any knife, the knife-thrower will settle for sharp things.
localizations.hint_27: You saw an aquarium next to the trailers. There must be something you can do with these fish.
localizations.hint_29: Sooner or later, you will have to restore the power.
localizations.hint_30: This banana peel is not really useful here. Best to throw it in the trash can.
localizations.hint_31: There are animals that are crazy for carrots.
localizations.hint_34: These rings will come in handy at the very end of the adventure.
localizations.hint_36: Watch this card from aside, or from very far, and a number will appear.
localizations.hint_39: Use what rabbits love most to coax this one. Go have a look around the trailers.
localizations.hint_42_first: The path the acrobats took is important. Draw it on the ring.
localizations.hint_42: Follow the path of the acrobats and you will see a letter. Take the corresponding card.
localizations.hint_43: To calm down the alligator, just shut its mouth.
localizations.hint_46_first: It is cold enough to freeze fish.
localizations.hint_46: Frozen, some fish would become stiff and could be used in a number.
localizations.hint_47_first: Thanks to its stamp, your ticket will be complete.
localizations.hint_47: What number do you get if your ticket is stamped?
localizations.hint_52_first: Precisely follow the instructions by using the inserted cards in the program.
localizations.hint_52: Once the Big Top is up, enjoy your work above. And mainly, the lit lamps.
localizations.hint_56: To start the show, take card Z.
localizations.hint_58: Place correctly this card on top of the circus ring.
localizations.hint_59: The figure Blazing Match performs is not inconsequential. Its blazing course draws two numbers. Take that card.
localizations.hint_62_first: First, you must find Micco's nose. Look around the trailers, then come back here.
localizations.hint_62: To perfom the clown's number, follow the program's instructions.
localizations.hint_63: Place correctly this card on top of the circus ring.
localizations.hint_64: Strong and sharpened, they look like real knives.
localizations.hint_66: Look Mr. Loyal's eyes. They show you a card.
localizations.hint_67: This wet paint will come in handy at the end of the adventure.
localizations.hint_68: You ticket is stamped, you can show it to the strongest man in the world.
localizations.hint_71: This mice will come in handy at the very end of the game.
localizations.hint_72: This place will come in handy several times during the adventure. Feel free to return several times to specific spots.
localizations.hint_76_first: Make sure to place the card edge on the dotted line and find a number on either side.
localizations.hint_76: Focus your eyes on the white line, at the level of the sawfish teeth. Isn't a number starting to form?
localizations.hint_77_first: All that's left to do is to put it back in the right cage. Tiger Ray will assist you.
localizations.hint_77: Ray's stripes show in what order you need to put back the animals.
localizations.hint_81_first: All that's left to do is to put it back in the right cage. Tiger Ray will assist you.
localizations.hint_81: Ray's stripes show in what order you need to put back the animals.
localizations.hint_82: Each colored circle has a value going from 1 to 5. It will be used when the knives will be thrown.
localizations.hint_87: If you don't know what balloon to pick, it's not the right moment yet.
localizations.hint_88_first: All that's left to do is to put it back in the right cage. Tiger Ray will assist you.
localizations.hint_88: Ray's stripes show in what order you need to put back the animals.
localizations.hint_89: Mr. Loyal looks at the red curtain.
localizations.hint_91: Fish have not randomly landed. The score is important.
localizations.hint_99_first: Flip the program over and do the math.
localizations.hint_99: Don't forget Matthew asked you to add 3.
localizations.hint_111_first: Each juggler has his devices and his color(s).
localizations.hint_111: The rings corresponding to the green juggler form a 2. What do the clubs of the second one form?
localizations.hint_222_first: Mr. Loyal turns his back to you. Face him.
localizations.hint_222: Flip this card over and put it on the ring using the lights.
localizations.answer_hint_6: Letters I and O of the neon light form number 10.
localizations.answer_hint_12: With Blazing Match's help (machine 72: Blazing Match's trailer gives the Blue modifier +47), get the red balloon (12) back.
localizations.answer_hint_13: You will need the sawfish (76) once more time to cut the ties (13).
localizations.answer_hint_14: By sticking the tiger (14) to the wet paint on the fence (67), you give Ray its stripes back.
localizations.answer_hint_17: The balloon seller will inflate a fake mouse.
localizations.answer_hint_18: The number of this card is 18. So, the next number is 19.
localizations.answer_hint_19: Combine the sawfish (card 22: modifier +57) with the assistant (19).
localizations.answer_hint_30: Throw the banana (39) in the generator's trash can (16) to restore the power.
localizations.answer_hint_36: When the card is accurately oriented or distant, you can make out a 32 by optical illusion.
localizations.answer_hint_39: Give the carrot (vegetable garden of machine 72 - card 31) to the rabbit hiding in the hat (39).
localizations.answer_hint_42: The lap forms a circle and the leaving forms the tail of the letter Q.
localizations.answer_hint_43: Muzzle the alligator (43) with the rings (34).
localizations.answer_hint_46: Make the sawfish stiff (card 22: modifier +18) in the freezer (46).
localizations.answer_hint_47: Once the 8 is stamped by the bearded woman (47), you can read number 68.
localizations.answer_hint_52: Look at the lit bulbs from above. Card 59 forms a 1 on the left side and a 6 on the right side (with the Big Top). Card 85 forms a 9 on the left side (with the Big Top) and a 7 on the right side. Therefore, the customer service code is 1697.
localizations.answer_hint_58: You form on the right side a new gray number: 42.
localizations.answer_hint_59: The flames first form a 1, then an 8.
localizations.answer_hint_62: By pressing 3 times the flower and once the nose, the water Micco projects forms a 58.
localizations.answer_hint_63: You form a 34 on the left side and a 62 on the right side.
localizations.answer_hint_64: Give these swordfish (64) to the knife-thrower (27).
localizations.answer_hint_66: A 3 in the left eye, a 6 in the right eye.
localizations.answer_hint_68: Show the stamped ticket (68) at the admission (15).
localizations.answer_hint_76: An 8 on the left and a 5 (look diagonally) on the right form reading-wise the card an 85.
localizations.answer_hint_81: The animal sizes (or card numbers) in ascending order (<<<<): enter 24/77/81/88.
localizations.answer_hint_89: By placing this card on top of the ring, you form number 66 on the red curtain.
localizations.answer_hint_91: 1 fish in the orange circle, 1 in the sky-blue, 1 in the dark blue, and 2 in the white. A total of 5+3+2+1+1=12..
localizations.answer_hint_99: On the back of the program, following the yellow stripes, you can read the calculation: 9+7-3+6-2+4 = 21. Add 3.
localizations.answer_hint_111: The green rings for a "2", the yellow clubs a "+", and the pink and purple balls a "61". Which gives "2+61"..
localizations.answer_hint_222: Align this back with the lights on top of the ring. New gray numbers form.
localizations.machine_81: Phew! The animals are now under control. But Professor Noside took the opportunity to run away and the circus is nothing but a desolate theater.
localizations.machine_87: After a few maneuvers, the balloon takes shape.
localizations.machine_62_hint_step1_1: First, you must find Micco's nose. Look around the trailers, then come back here.
localizations.machine_62_hint_step2_1: To perform the clown's number, follow the program's instructions.
localizations.machine_62_hint_step2_2: By pressing 3 times the flower and once the nose, the water Micco projects forms a 58.
localizations.machine_72_aquarium_early: A sign indicates "Beware: dangerous fish, wait for the end of my number." Signed: Clown Micco.
localizations.machine_72_haie: The painter paints the fence in black, next to the generator that powers the circus.
localizations.machine_72_clown_early: No trace of the clown… He must be in the Big Top. Come back later.
localizations.machine_72_clown: You find the clown's red nose among this jumble. The show can go on.
localizations.machine_72_clown_late: There's nothing left to do here. The clown went to feed the fish.
localizations.machine_72_potager_early: Convenient for getting a batch of vitamins, but for the moment it is useless.
localizations.machine_72_trapeziste_early: The trapeze artist, Blazing Match is getting ready for her number and has no time for you.
localizations.machine_72_trapeziste: Responding to your cry for help, the trapeze artist hurries to the Big Top.
localizations.machine_72_trapeziste_late: Blazing Match is no longer in her trailer, she must be still in the Big Top.
localizations.machine_72_loyal: Mr. Loyal's trailer, but there's nothing you can do. This padlock is tightly locked.
localizations.machine_87_error: The balloon bursts. This is not the right shape.
localizations.machine_62_sad: He seems so sad, he forgot to take his red nose.
localizations.machine_87_question: What shape do you want for your balloon?
